name: sri-guide
description: Explore Sri Lanka with Confidence - open-source travel guide web app
author: dilshan-h

scripts.pagefind-fix: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const f='dist/pagefind/pagefind.js'; let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'); c=c.split('?ts=${Date.now()}').join(''); fs.writeFileSync(f,c);"
